markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Introduce new GrowthX team structure and align on future strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/EDsFaMxDVW9HAXTpg6ArxwJxKuAB2JwC?tab=summary&timestamp=488.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New GrowthX Structure:** Erik O'Brien is now the primary contact, leading day-to-day delivery. Kyle Gaudreau and Sydney Arin Go will provide strategic support on an as-needed basis.](https://fathom.video/share/EDsFaMxDVW9HAXTpg6ArxwJxKuAB2JwC?tab=summary&timestamp=498.0)
  - [**Strategic Pivot:** Okta is shifting from vertical-based targeting to a universal, signal-based approach. This strategy uses identity complexity (e.g., multiple logins, competitor use) to identify high-value accounts.](https://fathom.video/share/EDsFaMxDVW9HAXTpg6ArxwJxKuAB2JwC?tab=summary&timestamp=1093.0)
  - [**New Tech Stack:** Okta is evaluating Common Room for a unified UI to drive accountability. GrowthX Intel Briefs will be pushed into it to provide stronger signals than Common Room's native data.](https://fathom.video/share/EDsFaMxDVW9HAXTpg6ArxwJxKuAB2JwC?tab=summary&timestamp=1604.0)
  - [**Scaling Challenge:** The current manual process for Intel Briefs is limited to \~22 accounts/week. Okta needs to scale this to cover a target list of \~50 high-value accounts for 1-to-1 and 1-to-few ABX.](https://fathom.video/share/EDsFaMxDVW9HAXTpg6ArxwJxKuAB2JwC?tab=summary&timestamp=1795.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX Team Structure Update

  - [**New Roles & Rationale:** GrowthX implemented a new structure on Dec 1 to improve client clarity and capacity planning.](https://fathom.video/share/EDsFaMxDVW9HAXTpg6ArxwJxKuAB2JwC?tab=summary&timestamp=498.0)
      - [**Erik O'Brien (Engagement Manager):** Primary point of contact for daily delivery, coordinating execution and managing communications.](https://fathom.video/share/EDsFaMxDVW9HAXTpg6ArxwJxKuAB2JwC?tab=summary&timestamp=523.0)
      - [**Kyle Gaudreau (Strategy Lead):** Leads a shared strategy team, engaged by Erik for major strategic pivots or revamps.](https://fathom.video/share/EDsFaMxDVW9HAXTpg6ArxwJxKuAB2JwC?tab=summary&timestamp=511.0)
      - [**Sydney Arin Go:** Will transition from day-to-day delivery to a strategic support role.](https://fathom.video/share/EDsFaMxDVW9HAXTpg6ArxwJxKuAB2JwC?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [**Erik O'Brien's Background:** Joined GrowthX in August; previously in AI and general consulting.](https://fathom.video/share/EDsFaMxDVW9HAXTpg6ArxwJxKuAB2JwC?tab=summary&timestamp=713.0)

### Strategic Pivot: From Verticals to Signals

  - [**Problem:** Okta's current vertical-based targeting (e.g., retail) may be inefficient.](https://fathom.video/share/EDsFaMxDVW9HAXTpg6ArxwJxKuAB2JwC?tab=summary&timestamp=1093.0)
  - [**Hypothesis:** A universal signal-based approach will be more effective for identifying high-value accounts.](https://fathom.video/share/EDsFaMxDVW9HAXTpg6ArxwJxKuAB2JwC?tab=summary&timestamp=1093.0)
  - [**Core Mission:** Use identity signals to position Okta as a growth driver by addressing four key pain points:](https://fathom.video/share/EDsFaMxDVW9HAXTpg6ArxwJxKuAB2JwC?tab=summary&timestamp=997.0)
    1.  [**Identity Setup:** How it creates revenue roadblocks or customer friction.](https://fathom.video/share/EDsFaMxDVW9HAXTpg6ArxwJxKuAB2JwC?tab=summary&timestamp=1007.0)
    2.  [**Tool Adoption:** How it slows innovation (e.g., AI, cloud migration).](https://fathom.video/share/EDsFaMxDVW9HAXTpg6ArxwJxKuAB2JwC?tab=summary&timestamp=1013.0)
    3.  [**Security Posture:** How identity complexity weakens security.](https://fathom.video/share/EDsFaMxDVW9HAXTpg6ArxwJxKuAB2JwC?tab=summary&timestamp=1041.0)
    4.  [**Growth Potential:** How fixing identity can unlock 2-3x growth.](https://fathom.video/share/EDsFaMxDVW9HAXTpg6ArxwJxKuAB2JwC?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
  - [**Goal:** Define a Target Account List (TEL) by prioritizing accounts based on these identity signals, not just their industry.](https://fathom.video/share/EDsFaMxDVW9HAXTpg6ArxwJxKuAB2JwC?tab=summary&timestamp=1093.0)

### New Tech Stack & Scaling Challenge

  - [**Common Room Evaluation:** Okta is evaluating Common Room to create a unified UI for sales, XDR, and marketing, driving accountability with accurate, real-time data.](https://fathom.video/share/EDsFaMxDVW9HAXTpg6ArxwJxKuAB2JwC?tab=summary&timestamp=1604.0)
  - [**Data Strategy:**](https://fathom.video/share/EDsFaMxDVW9HAXTpg6ArxwJxKuAB2JwC?tab=summary&timestamp=1647.0)
      - [**Intel Briefs:** GrowthX briefs will be pushed into Common Room to provide stronger signals than its native data.](https://fathom.video/share/EDsFaMxDVW9HAXTpg6ArxwJxKuAB2JwC?tab=summary&timestamp=1681.0)
      - [**Clay:** Okta will hire a Clay contractor to scrape objective account data (e.g., number of logins, competitor use) to build the initial TEL.](https://fathom.video/share/EDsFaMxDVW9HAXTpg6ArxwJxKuAB2JwC?tab=summary&timestamp=1461.0)
  - [**Scaling Intel Briefs:**](https://fathom.video/share/EDsFaMxDVW9HAXTpg6ArxwJxKuAB2JwC?tab=summary&timestamp=1795.0)
      - [**Constraint:** The current manual process is limited to \~22 accounts/week.](https://fathom.video/share/EDsFaMxDVW9HAXTpg6ArxwJxKuAB2JwC?tab=summary&timestamp=1795.0)
      - [**Need:** Scale to cover a target list of \~50 high-value accounts for 1-to-1 and 1-to-few ABX.](https://fathom.video/share/EDsFaMxDVW9HAXTpg6ArxwJxKuAB2JwC?tab=summary&timestamp=2048.0)
      - [**Rationale:** The briefs are critical for these high-touch accounts, while a broader message can serve the larger 1-to-many segment.](https://fathom.video/share/EDsFaMxDVW9HAXTpg6ArxwJxKuAB2JwC?tab=summary&timestamp=2000.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Rachael Tiow (Okta):**](https://fathom.video/share/EDsFaMxDVW9HAXTpg6ArxwJxKuAB2JwC?tab=summary&timestamp=2094.0)
      - [Document the signal-based TEL strategy for async review.](https://fathom.video/share/EDsFaMxDVW9HAXTpg6ArxwJxKuAB2JwC?tab=summary&timestamp=2094.0)
      - [Hire a Clay contractor to scrape objective account data.](https://fathom.video/share/EDsFaMxDVW9HAXTpg6ArxwJxKuAB2JwC?tab=summary&timestamp=1461.0)
      - [Share the initial list of \~50 high-value accounts once identified.](https://fathom.video/share/EDsFaMxDVW9HAXTpg6ArxwJxKuAB2JwC?tab=summary&timestamp=2048.0)
  - [**GrowthX Team:**](https://fathom.video/share/EDsFaMxDVW9HAXTpg6ArxwJxKuAB2JwC?tab=summary&timestamp=2094.0)
      - [Help define the signal-based TEL strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/EDsFaMxDVW9HAXTpg6ArxwJxKuAB2JwC?tab=summary&timestamp=1410.0)
      - [Ask network for Clay contractor recommendations.](https://fathom.video/share/EDsFaMxDVW9HAXTpg6ArxwJxKuAB2JwC?tab=summary&timestamp=1461.0)
      - [Review the B2B SaaS briefs to compare them against the retail briefs.](https://fathom.video/share/EDsFaMxDVW9HAXTpg6ArxwJxKuAB2JwC?tab=summary&timestamp=2173.0)
